The '''Urban Navigator''' was a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] manufactured by [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech]] in the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] and the only model considered to rival the speeder bikes put out by [[Lhosan Industries]]. Designed to operate in large cities, the Urban Navigator was capable of operating at higher altitudes than many similar models. A sidecar allowed for a passenger, though this cut down on its maneuverability.

[[File:Swoopjedi.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Zayne Carrick transporting Marn Hierogryph in an Urban Navigator.]]

[[Zayne Carrick]]'s swoop was of this model. When Zayne finally caught his quarry, [[Marn Hierogryph]], he had the [[Snivvian/Legends|Snivvian]] handcuffed to his passenger side and headed straight for the [[Jedi Tower]] for the [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|Knighting ceremony]] instead of the authorities. Zayne quickly got to his swoop after his Masters [[Padawan Massacre|killed his friends]], but [[Raana Tey]] sliced the passenger compartment from the drive.

Taris [[Sector Constable]] [[Noana Sowrs]] also owned one until it was stolen by [[Brejik]] of the [[Hidden Beks]] swoop gang. It was returned to her when the Beks met up with the Taris resistance.
